title: 2025 annual temperature anomalies
subtitle: 12 communities
description: Daily mean temperature compared with 1981-2010 normals for Yukon communities.
source: AHCCD base, ECCC daily observations, and ERA5-Land gap filling with source flags

title: KCIBR race-day weather forecast
subtitle: 7 communities
description: Rider-facing weather forecast plots for the Kluane Chilkat International Bike Relay. Plots show expected temperature, rain, wind effect, gusts, cloud cover, and UV index along the route.

title: Monthly temperature rankings
subtitle: 2 communities
description: Monthly and annual area-average temperature rankings based on ERA5 2 m temperature.
source: ERA5 2 m temperature from Copernicus Climate Change Service / ECMWF

title: Seasonal temperature anomalies
subtitle: 1 communities
description: Seasonal ERA5-Land near-surface air temperature anomalies for Yukon and surrounding regions relative to the 1981-2010 baseline.
source: ERA5-Land monthly 2 m temperature, processed from local GRIB archive
